signatureDefinition: Signature = [type (artifact/species), niche identity, dominant regulatory gate profile, dominant trigger class, dominant mechanic class, branch role/preference, co-evolution tendency].
significanceRules: A signature is significant when observation count >= 3, occupancy share >= 0.05, and persistence >= 2 seasons. Novelty additionally requires max similarity < 0.75 vs prior significant signatures.
interpretation: The ecosystem is currently recycling old strategies more than generating novel persistent strategies.
